headline: 3 Reasons HUBB Has Explosive Upside Potential
summary: Since April 2021, the S&P 500 has delivered a total return of 61.5%. But one standout stock has more than doubled the market - over the past five years, Hubbell has surged 157% to $494.25 per share. Its momentum hasn’t stopped as it’s also gained 19.7% in the last six months thanks to its solid quarterly results, beating the S&P by 22%.
